MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-07-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned from the Master Calendar by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Anna Dubrovsky, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tanya (Tatiana) Cherkas, also present.
Deborah Bjonerud, special appearance for Defendant: Becky Zhi You Wong, not present.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record without the presence of the parties.
Settlement in the amount of $7,500.00 within 14 days.
Matter is placed on the CRC-225 calendar on Dec. 7, 2004 at 10:00 a.m. in Dept. 212. for Dismissal.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
